task_objective: Integrate Codex review step into the repository's pre-commit hook and verify functionality.
tests_added: tests/test_protocol.py assertion for Codex review step
design_decisions: Add Codex review validation step to the tracked scripts/pre_commit.sh hook file.
Refactor local .git/hooks/pre-commit to delegate immediately to the tracked scripts/pre_commit.sh, preventing future hook divergence and missing frontend/TDD check gaps.
Update test_protocol.py assertions to enforce that the tracked hook performs Codex review on uncommitted changes.
results: All pytest test suites passed successfully.
Local pre-commit script executes all checks, including Codex review, and succeeds.
Ruff linting and formatting verify successfully.
Type check via ty passes on all modules.
